name: hn_feed
description: Fetch a shortlist from a Hacker News feed (front page / ask / show / jobs). Call after set_searching_state when the user asks what's been on the front page lately, who's hiring, etc. Uses the public HN Algolia API — no auth. Note: returns recent items in date order, NOT the current live top-ranked list. Frame answers as 'recently on the front page', not 'the current top'.

query_params_schema.description: Which feed to fetch. Use 'front_page' for trending/top, 'ask_hn' for Ask HN, 'show_hn' for Show HN, 'job' for who's hiring / jobs.
How many stories to return (1-15). Use 6-8.
